selected_dialects.reason: Rotationally symmetric part: revolve_profile for outer 70mm / inner 30mm / thickness 30mm body, cut_center_bore for ID, cut_annular_groove for seal groove (width 5mm, depth 3mm), cut_circular_hole_pattern for 6x M8 holes on PCD 55mm
May be needed to combine axisymmetric body with any auxiliary features or to position bolt-hole pattern relative to the revolve axis if not handled within axisymmetric dialect

selected_domain_skills.reason: Seal groove width 5mm depth 3mm requires annular groove on end face — standard hydraulic cylinder end-cap feature

unsupported_capabilities: M8 thread form (holes modelled as plain through/bottomed bores)
safety_notes: Output is reference geometry only — not certified for production.
M8 mounting holes are modelled as plain cylindrical bores; actual thread geometry is not generated.
Seal groove dimensions (width 5mm, depth 3mm) are interpreted as an annular groove on the end face; actual O-ring/gasket compatibility must be verified by the engineer.
